code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split_whitespace(input)
let a_str = match parts.get(0) when Some(x) x when None "0" end
let b_str = match parts.get(1) when Some(x) x when None "0" end
let s_str = match parts.get(2) when Some(x) x when None "1" end
let a = match string.parse_int(a_str) when Some(n) n when None 0 end
let b = match string.parse_int(b_str) when Some(n) n when None 0 end
let s = match string.parse_int(s_str) when Some(n) n when None 1 end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
mut i = a
while i < b
  if first
    out = "#{i}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{i}"
  end
  i = i + s
end
println(out)
